text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1754.  
But if we apply modern time zone definitions retroactively:  
US/Pacific = UTC-8 (with no DST in 1754), Asia/Shanghai = UTC+8.  
Difference: UTC+8 − (UTC-8) = 16 hours ahead.  

1 PM (13:00) May 13, 1754 in US/Pacific →  
13:00 + 16 hours = 29:00 → 05:00 next day.  
Date: May 14, 1754.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1754-05-14 05:00
